description: A color candid photograph from a Police Week event. A senior police officer in a dark dress uniform with gold-braided cap and four-star/rank insignia bends down to hand a small commemorative coin or patch to a toddler being held by a woman; a young girl covers her face shyly beside a man at left, and other officials and attendees mingle in the background outside a glass-walled building. There is no graphic text or design overlay (OCR returned only noise), making this a warm human-interest documentary photo rather than a designed meme. It accompanies the White House tweet honoring police and peace officers during Police Week.
